title: Anthropic Says That Mythos Has Also Solved The 80-Year-Old Planar Unit Distance Problem Solved By OpenAI
summary: Anthropic Says That Mythos Has Also Solved The 80-Year-Old Planar Unit Distance Problem Solved By OpenAI OpenAI had generated plenty of buzz by coming up with a breakthrough for an 80-year-old Erdős problem, but Anthropic now says that it has also come up with a solution with its Mythos model.
